case_studies.title: Pilbara Lithium Targeting Review
case_studies.summary: Comprehensive structural and geochemical review to refine lithium pegmatite targets across a 1,200 km² Pilbara tenement package.
key_outcomes: Ranked 37 priority pegmatite targets into three clear tiers
Reduced planned reconnaissance drilling meterage by 22%
Integrated hyperspectral and geochemical datasets into a single target ranking model

case_studies.title: Greenbushes Lithium Expansion Concept Study
case_studies.summary: Concept-level study assessing brownfields lithium resource potential adjacent to the Greenbushes mining district.
key_outcomes: Outlined three high-priority structural corridors for follow-up drilling
Delivered an exploration roadmap aligned with client’s expansion timeline
Identified data gaps and recommended targeted mapping and geophysics

case_studies.title: Northern Territory Pegmatite Mapping Program
case_studies.summary: Rapid mapping and sampling campaign to delineate lithium-bearing pegmatite swarms in the Northern Territory.
key_outcomes: Mapped over 220 pegmatite bodies in six weeks
Discovered new spodumene-bearing pegmatites with up to 2.4% Li2O in rock chips
Provided drilling recommendations prioritized by access and heritage constraints

case_studies.title: Atacama Porphyry Copper Target Generation
case_studies.summary: Integrated geophysics, geochemistry, and alteration mapping to generate porphyry copper targets in the Atacama region.
key_outcomes: Defined four drill-ready porphyry centers with coincident IP chargeability and geochemical anomalies
Improved confidence in target ranking ahead of a 15,000 m drilling program
Delivered a phased exploration plan with contingency scenarios

case_studies.title: Southern Peru Copper Belt District Study
case_studies.summary: District-scale structural and alteration study to position a junior explorer within the Southern Peru copper belt.
key_outcomes: Identified three acquisition targets aligned with client’s risk profile
Benchmarked district potential against analogues in Chile and Mexico
Developed a staged exploration strategy and budget envelope

case_studies.title: Quebec Greenstone Belt Gold Targeting
case_studies.summary: Structural targeting and data integration study to support core drilling in the Abitibi greenstone belt.
key_outcomes: Ranked shear-hosted gold targets using structural and lithological criteria
Optimized proposed drill hole orientations to intersect high-grade shoots
Reduced duplication in planned drilling, saving an estimated 1,200 m

case_studies.title: West Africa Multi-Commodity Portfolio Review
case_studies.summary: Portfolio ranking study covering gold, base metal, and battery mineral opportunities across West Africa.
key_outcomes: Screened 19 projects and prioritized six for near-term investment
Provided risk-weighted NPVs for advanced-stage assets
Outlined exit and farm-out strategies for non-core licenses

case_studies.title: Athabasca Basin Uranium Resource Expansion
case_studies.summary: Targeting and drilling support to expand a high-grade unconformity uranium resource in the eastern Athabasca Basin.
key_outcomes: Extended known mineralization 350 m along strike
Improved resource classification by upgrading inferred tonnes to indicated
Refined structural model using oriented core and borehole geophysics

case_studies.title: Carajás Nickel Laterite Stratigraphic Study
case_studies.summary: Stratigraphic and regolith study to support nickel laterite resource estimation in the Carajás region.
key_outcomes: Standardized logging templates across three concurrent drilling campaigns
Improved laterite domain interpretation for resource modeling
Provided guidance on sampling protocols to minimize bias

case_studies.title: Central Andes Copper-Gold Structural Framework Study
case_studies.summary: Regional structural framework mapping for copper-gold exploration across multiple Andean belts.
key_outcomes: Defined key structural corridors controlling porphyry and epithermal mineralization
Integrated regional satellite data with field validation
Supported acreage rationalization across six country portfolios

case_studies.title: Patagonia Epithermal Gold Scoping Study
case_studies.summary: Scoping-level evaluation of low-sulfidation epithermal gold potential in a remote Patagonia project.
key_outcomes: Outlined conceptual pit shells and resource potential scenarios
Highlighted critical risks related to water access and infrastructure
Recommended phased drilling plan to test high-grade vein extensions

case_studies.title: Ontario Brownfields Lithium Pegmatite Review
case_studies.summary: Desktop and field validation review of historical pegmatite workings for lithium potential in northern Ontario.
key_outcomes: Re-logged 6,500 m of historical core with a lithium-focused lens
Defined new lithium prospective trends in underexplored greenstone belts
Provided clear go/no-go decision points for follow-up drilling

content_items.title: Machine Learning for Greenfields Target Generation
content_items.summary: How machine learning workflows can reduce risk in greenfields mineral exploration targeting.
content_items.body: This article outlines practical steps for integrating geological, geophysical, and geochemical datasets into supervised and unsupervised machine learning models for greenfields targeting. It covers data preparation, feature engineering, model selection, and validation approaches grounded in geological reasoning.

content_items.title: Practical Machine Learning Workflows for Geologists
content_items.summary: A step-by-step guide for exploration geologists implementing machine learning in day-to-day targeting.
content_items.body: Focusing on realistic datasets and constraints, this article walks through building classification and clustering models using drilling, surface sampling, and geophysical inputs. It emphasizes quality control, interpretability, and collaboration between geologists and data scientists.

content_items.title: Integrating Geophysics and Geology in Early-Stage Copper Exploration
content_items.summary: Best practices for combining geophysical surveys with geological mapping to refine copper drill targets.
content_items.body: We review case studies where IP, magnetics, and gravity data were combined with detailed mapping and geochemistry to constrain porphyry copper targets, highlighting common pitfalls and strategies for maximizing value from early-stage data.

content_items.title: Designing Cost-Effective RC Drilling Campaigns
content_items.summary: Guidelines for planning reverse circulation drilling programs that balance geological objectives and cost.
content_items.body: This article details the key drivers of RC drilling costs, including meterage, mobilization, standby, and sampling. It provides example budget structures and shows how scenario analysis can keep total costs within defined envelopes.

content_items.title: ESG Considerations in Early-Stage Exploration
content_items.summary: How to integrate environmental and social (ESG) principles into greenfields exploration programs.
content_items.body: We outline practical ESG steps that can be implemented from the first reconnaissance visit, including stakeholder mapping, baseline data collection, and transparent communication plans.

content_items.title: Advances in Resource Estimation for Porphyry Copper Deposits
content_items.summary: Recent developments in geostatistics and domaining for large porphyry copper systems.
content_items.body: The article reviews updated approaches to domaining, variography, and conditional simulation in porphyry copper deposits, including the role of structural geology and alteration in defining estimation domains.

content_items.title: Data Rooms and QA/QC for Exploration Transactions
content_items.summary: Key checks for technical due diligence when acquiring exploration properties.
content_items.body: We summarize the minimum QA/QC, data management, and reporting checks that should be completed before transacting on exploration assets.

content_items.title: Building Robust Exploration Budgets in Volatile Markets
content_items.summary: Approaches for stress-testing exploration budgets against cost and commodity price volatility.
content_items.body: We discuss scenario analysis, contingency planning, and cost tracking processes that help keep exploration programs aligned with strategy despite shifting market conditions.

content_items.title: Fundamentals of Resource Estimation for Junior Miners
content_items.summary: A practical introduction to resource estimation concepts, workflows, and reporting codes tailored for junior exploration companies.
content_items.body: This webinar covers key concepts such as data preparation, compositing, domaining, variography, and block modeling. It also explains how to interpret outcomes and work effectively with estimation specialists.

content_items.title: Geostatistics and Machine Learning in Resource Estimation
content_items.summary: Explore how classical geostatistics and modern machine learning can be combined in resource estimation workflows.
content_items.body: We discuss use cases where machine learning models support domaining, grade interpolation, and uncertainty analysis, with case studies from copper and gold deposits.

content_items.title: Designing RC Drilling Programs in Canada
content_items.summary: Technical and logistical considerations for planning RC drilling campaigns in Canadian terrains.
content_items.body: Topics include contractor selection, seasonal access, cost structures, and common pitfalls in Canadian RC programs.

content_items.title: Implementing ESG in Early Exploration
content_items.summary: Practical steps to embed ESG into early-stage exploration programs.
content_items.body: We cover stakeholder mapping, baseline data, and communication approaches that align with lender and investor expectations.

content_items.title: Using Digital Tools for Exploration Budget Estimation
content_items.summary: A walkthrough of online budget estimator tools for drilling, geophysics, and field programs.
content_items.body: This session demonstrates how to quickly generate and iterate on exploration budget scenarios using digital estimators.

content_items.title: Resource Estimation Case Studies: Lessons Learned
content_items.summary: Archived webinar discussing common pitfalls and best practices in resource estimation.
content_items.body: Through several case studies, we highlight issues that arise when data, domaining, and QA/QC are not adequately addressed.

experts.name: Dr. Maria Alvarez
experts.biography: Maria is a structural geologist and senior consultant with over 18 years of experience on porphyry copper and epithermal systems across Chile, Peru, Mexico, and Canada. She has led multiple district-scale targeting and drill program design mandates in the Chilean Andes, with a strong focus on integrating geophysics, geochemistry, and 3D structural modeling.

experts.name: Dr. Liam O’Connor
experts.biography: Liam is a principal resource geologist specializing in resource estimation and geostatistics for large copper, gold, and uranium deposits. He has signed off on numerous JORC and NI 43-101 compliant resource statements and regularly trains client teams on estimation best practice.

experts.name: Dr. Hannah Lee
experts.biography: Hannah bridges geology and data science, focusing on machine learning applications in mineral exploration. She has built and deployed targeting models for copper, gold, and lithium projects globally, and co-authors guidance notes on data science in exploration.

experts.name: Michael Brown
experts.biography: Michael is a senior exploration planner with a background in field geology and project management. He specializes in building realistic, defensible exploration budgets and drilling plans that align technical objectives with funding constraints.

experts.name: Sofia Mendes
experts.biography: Sofia is an environmental and social performance specialist supporting exploration teams to embed ESG from first entry. She has led baseline studies, impact assessments, and community engagement programs across multiple jurisdictions.

experts.name: James Carter
experts.biography: James focuses on building data pipelines, dashboards, and analytics tools to support targeting, budget planning, and program tracking in exploration teams.

experts.name: Emma Johansson
experts.biography: Emma advises on technical due diligence for exploration and development transactions, with a focus on data quality, QA/QC, and risk assessment.

experts.name: Rajiv Patell
experts.biography: Rajiv designs and interprets geophysical surveys for greenfields and brownfields projects, with particular emphasis on IP, EM, and airborne magnetics.

experts.name: Amelia Nguyen
experts.biography: Amelia supports field programs in Australia, focusing on lithium pegmatite mapping and drill supervision.

experts.name: Carlos Vega
experts.biography: Carlos is a senior geologist with 17 years of experience on Andean porphyry copper and skarn systems, from early-stage mapping through to resource drilling. He has managed field teams on several major porphyry copper projects in northern and central Chile.

service_packages.name: Gold RC Drilling Support - Core Package
service_packages.summary: Focused gold RC drilling support including drill program design and QA/QC setup for cost-effective first-pass testing.
service_packages.description: Designed for junior gold explorers planning an initial RC drilling campaign, this core package combines an independent geological review with detailed drill program design and robust sampling/QA/QC setup. It is optimized for modest meterage programs where cost control and data quality are critical.

service_packages.name: Gold Advanced Drilling & Geophysics Package
service_packages.summary: Comprehensive gold exploration support combining drill program design, geological mapping, and integrated geophysics.
service_packages.description: This package is tailored to advanced gold projects transitioning from discovery to resource definition. It includes detailed geological mapping, integrated geophysical interpretation, and drill program design, supported by QA/QC setup to ensure robust data for resource estimation.

service_packages.name: Gold Early-Stage Targeting Package
service_packages.summary: Strategic targeting support for early-stage gold projects, prior to committing to drilling.
service_packages.description: Ideal for explorers screening new gold projects or belts, this package includes a geological review, integrated target generation, and an exploration program design that sequences mapping, geophysics, and early drilling in line with budget constraints.

service_packages.name: Copper Porphyry Targeting Starter Package
service_packages.summary: Starter package for porphyry copper projects focusing on concept review and target generation.
service_packages.description: Combining a focused geological review with data integration and target generation, this package helps teams quickly identify the most prospective porphyry copper targets and outlines a pragmatic phased exploration work plan.

service_packages.name: Copper Porphyry Full Study Package
service_packages.summary: End-to-end porphyry copper study integrating mapping, geophysics, data analytics, and targeting.
service_packages.description: For companies seeking a comprehensive, district-scale view, this package integrates geological mapping, geophysics, and data analytics, culminating in machine learning-supported target ranking and a phased exploration strategy.

service_packages.name: Lithium Pegmatite Discovery Package
service_packages.summary: Mapping, geophysics, and analytics package designed for lithium pegmatite discovery campaigns.
service_packages.description: Focused on greenfields lithium pegmatite belts, this package combines detailed geological mapping with targeted geophysical support and data analytics to highlight the most prospective trends and pegmatite swarms.

service_packages.name: Lithium Data-Driven Targeting Lite
service_packages.summary: Lean, data-focused package for ranking lithium exploration opportunities using existing datasets.
service_packages.description: A cost-effective package for teams with significant historical data, focusing on target generation and data analytics to quickly screen lithium opportunities before committing to field programs.

service_packages.name: Uranium Athabasca Drill-Ready Package
service_packages.summary: Geophysics-led package to bring Athabasca uranium projects to drill-ready status with clear drill program design.
service_packages.description: Developed for unconformity uranium targets, this package includes geophysical survey design and interpretation, followed by drill program design and QA/QC setup to support compliant resource drilling.

service_packages.name: Nickel Laterite Resource Support Package
service_packages.summary: Resource-focused package for nickel laterite projects combining program design, QA/QC, and analytics.
service_packages.description: For nickel laterite projects preparing for maiden or updated resource estimates, this package supports exploration program design, sampling and QA/QC setup, and data analytics to standardize and validate drilling datasets.

service_packages.name: Greenfields ESG & Targeting Package
service_packages.summary: Integrates ESG baseline, stakeholder planning, and early-stage target generation for new districts.
service_packages.description: Designed for first entry into new jurisdictions, this package combines ESG baseline studies and stakeholder engagement planning with technical target generation to align exploration concepts with social and environmental expectations.

service_packages.name: Copper-Gold District Strategy Package
service_packages.summary: District-scale copper-gold strategy package combining mapping, geophysics, analytics, and ESG.
service_packages.description: For companies holding multi-license copper-gold positions, this package integrates geological mapping, geophysics, and data analytics with ESG baseline planning to define a clear, sequenced district exploration strategy.

service_packages.name: RC Drilling Cost Optimization Package
service_packages.summary: Multi-commodity RC drilling optimization package with drill program design and on-site supervision.
service_packages.description: Aimed at explorers planning large RC programs across commodities, this package combines drill program design with RC drilling supervision and QA/QC setup to optimize meterage, reduce standby time, and improve sample quality.
